channel.title: 2026-06-14 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-06-14 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: A career of taking biological species for a spin
item.description:
📚 Nature Reviews Chemistry
👤 Ad Bax, Stephanie Greed
Nature Reviews Chemistry, Published online: 14 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41570-026-00843-6 Ahead of his 70th birthday, Adriaan (Ad) Bax, Distinguished Investigator at the National Institutes of Health (NIH), spoke about his career in science.

item.title: Pd Single‐Atom‐Doped Cu3Co Quantum Dots With Optimized Hydrogenation Kinetics for Versatile Aluminum‐Nitrate Primary Battery With Synchronous Energy Harvesting and Waste Valorization
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Fuyu Liu, Kangyi Yu, Yinfeng Liu, Hang Yang, Xin Long, Arunpandiyan Surulinathan, Renfei Feng, Yu Zhang, Xian‐Zhu Fu, Bin Zhao, Jing‐Li Luo
Angewandte Chemie International Edition, EarlyView.

item.title: Predicting Regional Cerebral Protein Synthesis from Structural MRI Morphometrics
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 Filippos Vryonis, Athanasios Dossis, Nikolaos Giannakeas, Pantelis Angelidis, Markos Tsipouras
This study evaluates whether structural MRI morphometrics provide incremental predictive information about regional cerebral protein synthesis (rCPS) measured with L-[1-¹¹C]leucine PET. Using open-access paired MRI–PET data from OpenNeuro (ds004733), originally acquired to quantify rCPS across sleep-related experimental conditions, we repurpose the dataset for out-of-subject predictive modeling across individuals. ROI-level rCPS values were extracted separately for each session and then averaged across the three sessions to yield a single condition-averaged target (PET_Mean) per subject and region. FreeSurfer-derived regional morphometrics (cortical thickness, surface area, curvature, and volumetry) were integrated with a categorical ROI identifier in a supervised learning framework. Mode…
